mouseDown(int, Location) - Method in class javadraw.Window
Deprecated.
Please use argument order (Location, int) or (Location)
mouseDown(Location) - Method in class javadraw.Window
MouseDown event, called when a button on the mouse is pressed
mouseDown(Location, int) - Method in class javadraw.Window
MouseDown event, called when a button on the mouse is pressed
mouseDrag(int, Location) - Method in class javadraw.Window
Deprecated.
Please use argument order (Location, int) or (Location)
mouseDrag(Location) - Method in class javadraw.Window
MouseDrag event, called when a button on the mouse is pressed and held while the mouse moves.
mouseDrag(Location, int) - Method in class javadraw.Window
MouseDrag event, called when a button on the mouse is pressed and held while the mouse moves.
MouseEventListener - Interface in javadraw
 
mouseMove(Location) - Method in class javadraw.Window
MouseMove event, called when the mouse moves on the Screen

mouseUp(int, Location) - Method in class javadraw.Window
Deprecated.
Please use argument order (Location, int) or (Location)
mouseUp(Location) - Method in class javadraw.Window
MouseUp event, called when a button on the mouse is released
mouseUp(Location, int) - Method in class javadraw.Window
MouseUp event, called when a button on the mouse is released
move(double, double) - Method in interface javadraw.DrawableObject
Move the Object by a specified distance, (dx, dy).
move(double, double) - Method in class javadraw.Line
Move the line (both first and second positions) by a specified dx and dy.
move(double, double) - Method in class javadraw.Location
Move the Location by a specified distance on the x and y axes.
move(double, double) - Method in class javadraw.MultiRenderable
 
move(double, double) - Method in interface javadraw.MultiRenderableMember
 
move(double, double) - Method in class javadraw.Renderable
Move the object by a specific distance on both the x and y axes
move(double, double) - Method in class javadraw.ui.Component
 
move(Location) - Method in interface javadraw.DrawableObject
Move the Object by a specified distance, (dx, dy), pulled from a Location's x and y fields.
move(Location) - Method in class javadraw.Line
Move the line (both first and second positions) by a dx and dy pulled from a Location's x and y values.
move(Location) - Method in class javadraw.MultiRenderable
 
move(Location) - Method in interface javadraw.MultiRenderableMember
 
move(Location) - Method in class javadraw.Renderable
Move by a passed Location's x and y values.
move(Location) - Method in class javadraw.ui.Component
 
moveTo(double, double) - Method in interface javadraw.DrawableObject
Move the Object to a new Location on the Screen

Move the line to a new Location.

Move the Location to a new position altogether
